## RequestHookSuccess interface

Result returned by a request hook.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface RequestHookSuccess<Session = unknown>
```

## Remarks

Returning `undefined` or `{ authorized: true }` lets processing continue. Hooks may either attach session data by mutating `context.session` or by returning `{ session }`<!-- -->.
